Notice Of Hearing To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Nader Fannyan, Esq. of KILLIAN & FANNYAN, T:510.500.5775, for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF EVELYN BOWENS' Hearing To Confirm Arbitration Award as follows:

Plaintiff Evelyn Bowens' unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

A proposed order and a proposed judgment were submitted for the Court's review and approval.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
